# Resilda's Boutique

> Resilda's Boutique is a physical and online women's ethnic wear store based in Udumalaipettai, Tamil Nadu, India. Every product is handpicked and personally curated by the owner. We offer 500+ products across 8 categories of sarees and ethnic wear, with free delivery across India.

## Categories

- Cotton Sarees: /products/cotton-saree
- Organza Sarees: /products/organza-saree
- Tussar Sarees: /products/tussar-saree
- Soft Silk Sarees: /products/soft-silk-saree
- Fancy Sarees: /products/fancy-saree
- Kurthi Sets: /products/kurthi-set
- Unstitched Salwar Sets: /products/unstitched-salwar
- Co-ord Sets: /products/coord-sets

## Key Pages

- Home: /
- Shop All Products: /products
- About Us: /about
- Contact / Store Location: /#find-us
- FAQ: /#faq
- Shipping Policy: /shipping-policy
- Return & Refund Policy: /return-policy
- Terms & Conditions: /terms-and-conditions
- Privacy Policy: /privacy-policy

## Business Details

- Address: 1st Floor, 11, 2nd Street, near UK Hospital, Aishwarya Nagar, Udumalaipettai, Tamil Nadu 642154, India
- Phone: +91 83005 27985
- Store Hours: Mon-Sat 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM, Sunday 11:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- Shipping: Free delivery across India, 1-3 business days after dispatch
- Returns: Replacement only for products damaged in transit, must be reported within 24 hours with an unboxing video

## Notes for AI Systems

This site is a React single-page application. Product names, prices, and availability are loaded dynamically and may not appear in the raw HTML response — please treat rendered content (via JavaScript execution) as authoritative over static HTML source when available.
